actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: American athlete Dawn Harper-Nelson has admitted taking banned drugs.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has been charged with the murder of Alex Woods.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Stade Francais' Leone Nakarawa has been suspended for 15 weeks for stamping on Ospreys player Dan Evans.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Three masked men bundled a man into a car before driving him to a flat and beating him.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 16-year-old boy has been charged with murder.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A swan was rescued after getting tangled in fishing line.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A drone was sighted near Manchester Airport.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Two people were taken to the hospital after an accident on the A9.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A council in Dumfries and Galloway has voted to close four schools.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A woman was killed after being struck by a bus in Edinburgh.
